title: 410 Gone triggers circuit breaker for entire domain
description: In delivery.rs deliver_one (line 283-286), a 410 Gone response marks the delivery as dead AND calls circuit_record_failure for the target domain. A 410 means the specific remote actor was deleted -- it does not indicate the domain is failing. If 10+ deliveries to deleted accounts on the same domain accumulate (e.g., a wave of account deletions on a popular instance), the circuit breaker opens and blocks ALL deliveries to that domain for 1 hour, including deliveries to active accounts. Fix: do not call circuit_record_failure on 410 responses. The delivery is correctly marked dead (no retry), and no broader domain penalty is needed.
